name: swift-csp
description: SWIFT CSP / CSCF v2026 expert covering all 31 controls (24 mandatory + 7 advisory), including Control 2.4 now mandatory (back-office data flow security). Architecture types A1–A4/B, KYC-SA attestation (window July 1–Dec 31, 2026), independent assessment, gap analysis, fraud prevention, and cross-framework mapping.
